creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 193919
py-mox3.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch from svn for the Python package devel/py-mox3, an unofficial port of the Google mox framework to Python 3. It was meant to be as compatible with mox as possible, but small enhancements have been made.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
